title: Why I Quit My Dev Job Before AI Could Take It | Better Stack Podcast Ep. 16
summary: Elliot, a developer and content creator, discusses his transition away from traditional development work and his views on AI's role in software engineering. He shares his practical workflow with AI tools (using Claude Code and Codex for stubs and interfaces), his belief that LLMs are hitting diminishing returns, and his prediction of declining demand for coding tutorials.
